problem.headline: India's Drivers Deserve Better. So Do Passengers.
problem.headlineHtml:
India's Drivers Deserve Better.
So Do Passengers.
problem.description: India has one of the world's largest driver ecosystems — yet no national standard for driver professionalism exists.

cards.title: No Standardised Behaviour Training
cards.desc: Driving skill is tested. Behaviour, communication, and hygiene are not — leaving a major gap in service quality across the country.

cards.title: Growing Safety Concerns
cards.desc: Passengers — especially women and children — face anxiety around safety, comfort, and predictable conduct during every trip.

cards.title: Lower Ratings, Lower Earnings
cards.desc: Behavioural complaints directly reduce ratings, bookings, and income — without any structured support to help drivers improve.

cards.title: No Professional Recognition
cards.desc: Drivers are treated as informal workers despite serving millions daily. There is no certification that recognises their professional skill.

problem.quote: "When Indian drivers work abroad, they show higher discipline, better communication, and professional conduct. It is not about capability — it is about systems."

about.headline: A Bridge Between Work and Spiritual Dignity.
about.headlineHtml: A Bridge Between Work and Spiritual Dignity.
about.description:
KaramSetu — meaning "Bridge of Work" — is India's first structured, scalable, and nationally deployable soft skills and behavioural certification platform designed specifically for drivers.
We go beyond driving skills. KaramSetu trains and certifies drivers in communication, grooming, passenger safety, legal awareness, and professional conduct — transforming them from vehicle operators into certified service professionals.
highlights: Available in Hindi, English, and regional languages

certificate.title: KaramSetu Certification
certificate.desc: Upon completing the program, drivers receive a digitally verifiable certificate — recognised by platforms, government departments, and corporate clients. It is not just a document. It is a professional identity.

pillars.headline: 5 Pillars of Driver Excellence
pillars.description: A structured curriculum built around what passengers actually need — and what drivers deserve to know.

items.title: Behaviour & Professional Attitude
items.desc: Discipline, punctuality, emotional control, conflict handling, and respectful public conduct.

items.title: Communication Skills
items.desc: Polite passenger interaction, handling complaints professionally, multilingual basics, and professional language use.

items.title: Grooming & Personal Hygiene
items.desc: Dress code standards, personal cleanliness, vehicle hygiene practices, and professional presentation.

items.title: Safety & Security Awareness
items.desc: Women and child safety sensitivity, household security protocols, and emergency response basics.

items.title: Rights & Duties of Drivers
items.desc: Legal rights, traffic law awareness, ethical conduct, and passenger and public responsibilities.

benefits.headline: What KaramSetu Gives You
benefits.description: Certification is not just a piece of paper. It means more rides, better income, and the respect you deserve.

items.title: Higher Earnings
items.desc: Certified drivers get better ratings, more repeat bookings, and access to premium and corporate travel segments — all of which directly increase your income.

items.title: Better Ratings, More Rides
items.desc: Passengers trust and prefer certified drivers. Higher ratings mean the platform sends you more ride requests — automatically.

items.title: Official Professional Identity
items.desc: Your KaramSetu certificate is a recognised professional credential — verifiable by passengers, platforms, and employers. You are not just a driver. You are a certified service professional.

items.title: Learn on Your Phone, at Your Own Pace
items.desc: All modules are short (5–10 minutes), mobile-friendly, and available in Hindi and English. No need to attend classes. No loss of working hours.

steps.headline: Your Path to Certification
steps.description: Four simple steps from registration to a nationally recognised certificate.

items.title: Register & Verify
items.desc: Sign up with your Aadhaar and driving licence. Quick and fully digital.

items.title: Complete Modules
items.desc: Learn through short audio-visual lessons on your phone — at any time, from any place.

items.title: Take the Assessment
items.desc: Complete a simple digital evaluation to confirm your learning and receive your score.

items.title: Get Certified
items.desc: Receive your digitally verifiable KaramSetu certificate — shareable with platforms and passengers.

audience.headline: Built for Drivers. Trusted by Everyone.

groups.title: India's Drivers
groups.intro: Taxi, app-based (Ola/Uber), commercial, household, and ministerial drivers across Tier 1, 2, and 3 cities.
points: Earn more with a certified profile
Know your rights under Indian law

groups.title: Government & Ministry Officials
groups.intro: A scalable national framework aligned with India's skilling mission — ready for policy integration and state-level adoption.

groups.title: CSR & Corporate Partners
groups.intro: Fund structured upskilling of frontline workers. Measurable social impact, auditable outcomes, and alignment with national mobility reform.

impact.headline: A Mission for a Million Drivers
impact.description: KaramSetu's phased rollout aims to transform the professional identity of India's driver workforce over five years.

stats.label: Drivers to be certified by Year 5

vision.quote: KaramSetu is not a training program. It is a national behavioural infrastructure reform for mobility -
vision.description: Every driver who completes KaramSetu becomes a trusted representative of their platform, their city, and their country. Safer rides. Dignified livelihoods. Trusted cities.

cta.headline: Ready to Become a Certified Professional?
cta.description: Whether you are a driver looking to grow your career, a government body exploring the framework, or a CSR partner looking to create lasting impact — KaramSetu starts with a conversation.
points: Free for eligible drivers in pilot cities
